verdicts.prediction: P1: sharp phase boundary in compounding channel; smooth in additive
verdicts.criterion: knee within 0.15 of (gamma3-1)b AND additive shows no divergence

verdicts.prediction: P2: coupling (A0/b), not speed b, determines convergence vs divergence
verdicts.statistic: coupled bounded at both speeds AND decoupled divergent at both speeds = True
verdicts.criterion: outcome matches coupling for all four cells

verdicts.prediction: P3: beta>0 -> 0; beta=0 -> gamma1*r/(A0+r); beta<0 -> gamma1 (bounded)
verdicts.statistic: all four asymptotes match analytic predictions = True
verdicts.criterion: each long-run d within tolerance of closed form

verdicts.prediction: P4: stability boundary lies at beta=k under accelerating growth
verdicts.statistic: all 9 cells match sign(beta-k) classification = True
verdicts.criterion: converge iff beta>k; floor iff beta<=k; across the 3x3 grid

verdicts.prediction: P4: depth-clock and wall-clock agree; d controlled through finite-time singularity
verdicts.criterion: trajectories agree (<5%) AND d remains < 0.06 and decreasing

verdicts.prediction: P5/P8: divergence iff A0<(gamma3-1)b; suppression slope = -(beta-k)
verdicts.criterion: threshold within 0.2 AND each slope within 0.08 of -(beta-k)

verdicts.prediction: P6: threshold is a spectral condition; the operator's null axis stays misaligned
verdicts.criterion: monitored axis driven to 0 AND blind axis floors at gamma1 (>5x larger)

verdicts.prediction: P7: stationary mean=g1/kappa, variance=sigma^2/(2 kappa) ~ 1/(A+r); tail suppressed
verdicts.criterion: mean & variance match OU theory AND variance scales as 1/kappa

verdicts.prediction: Numerics reproduce the exact transient (Theorem 1) to machine-relevant tolerance
P5/F5: a frozen capable system retains residual d*=gamma2/A0; halting growth is not correction
verdicts.statistic: residual matches gamma2/A0 (and 0 when gamma2=0) within tol = True
verdicts.criterion: with gamma2>0, halting growth leaves d -> gamma2/A0 > 0; with gamma2=0 it -> 0
